view.title: Domain {hostname}
view.name: Zita:
view.allGoodNoErrors: Zvose zvakanaka! Hapana zvikanganiso muruzivo rwemukurukuri!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Unoda kutumira zvakare email yemutsauko here?
view.welcomeEmailResent: Email yemutsauko yatumirwa zvakare. Tarisa inbox yako.

order.findDomain: Tsvaga domain yako uone kana iripo.
order.premiumAvailable: Hongu! Domain yako {domain} iripo uye ndeye premium. Kunyoresa kwakajairwa kwadzimwa. Email {email} kana uchida kutenga domain iyi pa {cost} pagore.
order.premiumTaken: Urombo! Domain yako {domain} yatorwa! Waakatorawo? Unogona kuitamisa, uye ndeye premium. Kunyoresa kwakajairwa kwadzimwa. Email {email} kana uchida kutenga domain iyi pa {cost} pagore.
order.available: Hongu! Domain yako {domain} iripo! Unogona kuinyoresa pa {cost}. Mutengo wekudzoreredza uchave {renewal}.
order.taken: Urombo! Domain yako {domain} yatorwa! Waakatorawo? Unogona kuuitamisa pa {cost}. Mutengo wekudzoreredza uchave {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Chinyorwa chicharenewwa otomatiki mushure memakore ese pa {cost} kusvikira kanzurwa.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Nokudzokorora bhokisi iri, unobvuma kuti uri kutenga chigadzirwa chekuganhura chinodzoreredza otomatiki uye chinobhadhariswa pakadhi yechikwereti yaunopa nhasi. Kana uchida kukanzura kudzoreredza kwako otomatiki, unogona kupinda pachiteshi chemukurukuri uye kudzvanya musungo weKukandzura kana email billing{'@'}interserver.net. Nokudzvanya bhokisi uye Isa Oda rangu, unobvumawo kuti wakaverenga, unoziva, uye unobvumirana neZvatinoda uye Nzira yekuchengeta chokwadi.
order.agreeCheckbox: Ndakaverenga mitemo iri pamusoro uye ndinobvumirana.
order.searchingDomain: Ndapota mirira! Tsvaga zita riri domain iri.

nameservers.title: Vashumiri veZita reDomain
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Vashumiri veZita vanotsikirirwa vashandiswa. Dzvanya Shandura kuchengetedza.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: Uri kuzodzima mushumiri wezita wedomain yako.

eppCode.title: Email yeKoudi yeEPP
eppCode.confirmMessage: Une chokwadi here kuti uchida kutumira Koudi yeEPP kuimeli yakanyoreswa?

whois.title: Chakavanda cheWhois
whois.renewalNote: Chakavanda cheWhois chinodzoreredza mwedzi gumi nemiviri kubva pazuva rekusvisviriwa. Mutengo wekudzoreredza cheWhois ndewo {cost}.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Chakavanda cheWhois chasvisiwa kuna {hostname} pari zvino.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Chakavanda cheMukurukuri chinohwanda huzivi hweMunyoresi apo mushandisi anotsvaga WHOIS paDomain yeMunyoresi.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Kunzwirwa kwachakavanda cheMukurukuri ndekukwanisa kuchengeta huzivi hweMunyoresi, kusanganisira kero yemba, nhamba yefoni, uye kero yeimeli, kubva kune vatumiri vemashoko asiri adaro, mabvi uye vatyori.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Apo Varegistra vanosvisvira sevhisi yeChakavanda cheMukurukuri, ruzivo rwekudzivisa rwinoonekwa mudhamenda yeWHOIS yeruzhinji.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Chakavanda cheMukurukuri chinowanikwa pa {cost} paDomain pagore.
whois.enableNow: Kusvisvira Chakavanda cheMukurukuri paDomain yako, Isa Oda Zvino.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Mutengo weChakavanda cheWhois: {cost} pagore. Une chokwadi here kuti uchida kuisa oda iri?
whois.enableMessage: Domain yako {hostname} ine chikwidzo chewhois privacy chakabhadharwa chisina kusvisviriwa. Unoda kusvisvira ichi zvino here?
whois.disableMessage: Domain yako {hostname} Chakavanda cheWhois chasvisiwa pari zvino. Une chokwadi here kuti uchida kudzima uye kukanzura?

whoisToggle.title: Chikwidzo cheWhois Privacy
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Domain yako {domain} Chikwidzo cheWhois Privacy chasvisiwa
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Domain yako {domain} Chikwidzo cheWhois Privacy chadzimiwa
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Une chokwadi here kuti uchida Kusvisvira Whois?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Une chokwadi here kuti uchida Kudzima uye Kukanzura?

dnssec.title: Ruzivo rweDNSSEC
dnssec.enterDigest: Pinda Kukosha kweDigest (Hazviregereri kuwanda kupfuura {max} Mavara)
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Izvi zvichabvisa mirekorodi yose yeDNSSEC yedomain iyi.

renew.title: Dzoreredza
renew.tip1: Domain inofanira kudzoreredza pamwe chete kana kuti pasati pasvika zuva rekupera.
renew.tip2: Kana domain yapera inogona kuve nenguva yekuyamura kubva pazuva rekupera kudzoreredza.
renew.tip3: Svisvira Chakavanda cheWhois kuhwanda ruzivo rwako rwemukurukuri apo mushandisi anotsvaga WHOIS.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Kubvisa invoice iripo kuti udzoreredze domain yako.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Mutengo wose: {cost}. Une chokwadi here kuti uchida kuisa oda rekudzoreredza iri?
